description: Perform a hierarchical linear regression analysis on the 'ExamAnxiety.csv' dataset (/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv) to determine if 'Anxiety' predicts 'Exam' scores above and beyond 'Revise' (revision time). Use 'Exam' as the dependent variable, with 'Revise' in the first block and 'Anxiety' in the second block. Include R Squared Change statistics in the analysis. Save the JASP analysis file to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Hierarchical_Exam.jasp and create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/hierarchical_report.txt containing the R² value for Model 1, the R² Change value for Model 2, the F Change p-value for Model 2, and a one-sentence conclusion on whether Anxiety adds significant predictive power.
